name: The Unfinished War
specialty: A tactically versatile team, known for their ability to quickly adapt to various mission demands, setting them apart as a valuable asset in the Argent Blades.

members.name: Eamon Thorne
members.note: A scarred veteran with a steel prosthetic arm, leading his crew with unyielding resolve.

members.name: Ria Nightshade
members.note: The group's elusive scout, known for her keen senses and mysterious connection to the Undercity's shadows.

members.name: Grimm Ironfist
members.note: A stout and gruff fighter, renowned for his indomitable spirit and fortitude in the heat of battle.

visual: Clad in black leather and steel, The Unfinished War present a formidable and disciplined image in public, each member adorned with an unfinished silver war hammer — a symbol of their unyielding resolve.
reputation_note: Rumored to have completed missions that even the Argent Blades considered impossible, The Unfinished War have earned a reputation as a formidable force in the Undercity.
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a major-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+2/5)
